MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY BRADLEY, MONA MAYO SET FOR JAN-30-2008 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-01-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: $100.00 OR MORE ON THE FIRST OF EVERY MONTH COMMENCING FEBRUARY 1, 2008 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IF FULLY PAID. ON THE FILING OF AN AFFIDAVIT OR DECLARATION BY THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHOWING THAT ANY PAYMENT DUE HAS NOT BEEN PAID, THIS ORDER SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND THE CLERK MAY ISSUE A WRIT OF EXECUTION IMMEDIATELY, WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.(506).
